final:
module top_module(
    input [4:0] rs1_ID,
    input [4:0] rs2_ID,
    input rs1_valid,
    input rs2_valid,
    input [4:0] rd_EX,
    input memread_EX,
    input regwrite_EX,
    output stall
    );assign stall = 
    ( memread_EX && regwrite_EX && rs1_valid && (rs1_ID == rd_EX) )
    ||
    ( memread_EX && regwrite_EX && rs2_valid && (rs2_ID == rd_EX) );

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (memread_EX && !regwrite_EX && rs1_valid && (rs1_ID != rd_EX)) begin
        stall <= 1'b1;
      end else if (!memread_EX && regwrite_EX && rs2_valid && (rs2_ID != rd_EX)) begin
        stall <= 1'b1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
